signals.headline: US and Iran Plan Second Round of Ceasefire Talks Before April 7 Two-Week Truce Expires Next Week | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US and Iran Plan Second Round of Ceasefire Talks Before April 7 Two-Week Truce Expires Next Week | NO | MED confidence**[1][2][6]

A two-week US-Iran ceasefire, announced April 8 after 40 days of hostilities, remains in effect but faces expiration early next week without a long-term deal[1][3][4]. Recent weekend talks in Islamabad ended without agreement, yet both sides are now eyeing fresh negoti

US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?
